function.name: rag_search
function.description: Search the knowledge base for relevant documents. Returns text chunks with relevance scores. Use this when you need to find information from indexed documents.

query.description: The search query. Be specific and descriptive for best results.

top_k.description: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)

search_type.description: Search method. 'hybrid' combines semantic and keyword search (default: hybrid)

function.name: rag_query
function.description: Search the knowledge base and generate an answer using the retrieved context. Use this when you need a synthesized answer grounded in the indexed documents.

query.description: The question to answer based on the knowledge base.

top_k.description: Number of context chunks to use (default: 3)

function.name: document_index
function.description: Index a new document into the knowledge base. The document will be chunked, embedded, and made searchable.

content.description: The text content of the document to index.

title.description: A descriptive title for the document.
